pi_items.verified_value: Maintenance and Repair Workers, General (BLS SOC code 49-9071)
Facilities Management (NAICS code 561210 - Facilities Support Services)

pi_items.metadata_value: Updating standard operating procedures based on new safety regulations.
pi_items.verified_value: Task requires updating Preventive Maintenance (PM) definitions in OpenMaint based on safety directives for Arc Flash PPE, Lockout/Tagout procedures, and pressure specifications
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and task description

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic PM codes created by setup_task.sh. Equipment types are realistic: PM-CHILLER-01 (Annual Chiller Service), PM-BOILER-01 (Monthly Boiler Check), PM-ELEC-01 (HV Panel Inspection), PM-AHU-02 (Air Handler Unit Filter Change). Naming convention matches industry standards.
pi_items.source: Code inspection of setup_task.sh lines 78-99; PM naming conventions verified against HVAC industry practices

pi_items.metadata_value: Requirement to wear Arc Flash PPE Category 4 for HV Panel work (implicit in safety directive)
pi_items.verified_value: Arc Flash PPE Category 4 is a real NFPA 70E standard requirement for high-voltage electrical work. Requires 40+ cal/cm² rated arc flash suits with complete body protection, insulated tools, and head/face protection systems.

pi_items.metadata_value: Requirement to follow Lockout/Tagout procedures for chiller maintenance (in safety directive)
pi_items.verified_value: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) is a real OSHA standard (29 CFR 1910.147) for controlling hazardous energy during maintenance. It is a mandatory safety procedure to prevent serious injuries and fatalities.

pi_items.metadata_value: Boiler pressure requirement of 20-25 PSI (in safety directive)
pi_items.verified_value: For most commercial/industrial boilers, normal operating pressure is 18-25 PSI, with 25 PSI treated as the maximum safe operating limit. This range is realistic and consistent with industry standards.

pi_items.metadata_value: Maintenance durations: PM-ELEC-01 (90 min), PM-CHILLER-01 (240 min), PM-AHU-02 (60 min) per safety directive
pi_items.verified_value: These durations are realistic. Arc Flash work typically requires extended time for PPE setup (90 min reasonable). Chiller annual service with LOTO compliance requires substantial time (240 min/4 hours realistic for industrial chiller). AHU filter changes typically 30-60 minutes.
pi_items.source: HVAC preventive maintenance best practices and safety procedure standards

privileged_info_summary: This task involves updating Preventive Maintenance records in OpenMaint based on safety directives. The occupational classification (Maintenance and Repair Workers, General, BLS code 49-9071) and industry classification (Facilities Management, NAICS 561210) are both real, verified government classifications. The safety requirements referenced in the task are based on actual standards: Arc Flash PPE Category 4 (NFPA 70E), Lockout/Tagout procedures (OSHA 29 CFR 1910.147), and boiler pressure specifications (18-25 PSI operating range). All PM code naming conventions and maintenance durations are realistic and consistent with industry practices. The task uses entirely synthetic data created via setup scripts rather than real operational records.
